log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githyanki — Winged Striker (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Githyanki — Winged Striker HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Githyanki — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Githyanki — Winged Striker HP: 23/67
--- Githyanki — Winged Striker --- HP: 23/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
